schemas.description: Scenario contract accepted by run, score, and run-suite.

schemas.description: Canonical normalized trace emitted as normalized_trace.json.

schemas.description: Deterministic scorecard emitted as scorecard.json.

schemas.description: Task-completion verdict embedded in scorecards and emitted as task_completion.json.

schemas.description: Deterministic before/after state diff emitted as state_diff.json.

schemas.description: Read-only external verifier source config accepted by verify-state.

schemas.description: Reusable external-state validator config accepted by state-validators.

schemas.description: Compiled scenario assertion snippets emitted by state-validators.
schemas.name: state_validator_assertions

schemas.description: Compact per-run evidence digest emitted as run_digest.json.
schemas.name: run_digest

schemas.description: Common harness-run manifest emitted before mock or live scenario execution.

schemas.description: Harness run result linking sandbox, tool policy, trace, scorecard, and replay artifacts.

schemas.description: Harness replay receipt emitted after regenerating run artifacts from lineage.

schemas.description: Live Hermes runtime smoke summary emitted by scripts/live_hermes_smoke.py.

schemas.description: Trainer preflight launch guard over passed gates and trainer-facing artifacts.

schemas.description: Consumer-side trainer launch decision over a validated trainer preflight.

schemas.description: Portable trainer handoff archive manifest with copied evidence artifact hashes.
schemas.name: trainer_archive

schemas.description: Base-model scouting candidate with source, license review, terms, and compatibility metadata.

schemas.name: model_scout_manifest

schemas.description: One model registry entry linking a candidate snapshot to datasets, runs, adapters, evals, and promotions.
schemas.name: model_registry_entry

schemas.description: No-download compatibility report over tokenizer, chat template, serving, tool-call, structured-output, context, quantization, and memory metadata.
schemas.name: model_compatibility_report

schemas.description: Local model registry container with entries, aliases, rollback target, and alias history.
schemas.name: model_registry

schemas.description: Model-layer dry-run training plan written before downloads, heavy ML imports, or GPU work.
schemas.name: training_plan

schemas.name: agentic_lora_training_plan

schemas.description: Result archive emitted by scripts/train_agentic_lora.py after success, classified failure, or blocked launch.
schemas.name: agentic_lora_training_result

schemas.description: Local JSONL registry event for training result/failure handoff.
schemas.name: agentic_lora_training_registry_event

schemas.description: Registered tiny fixture manifest for no-download agentic LoRA smoke planning.
schemas.name: agentic_lora_smoke_fixture

schemas.description: Side-effect-free external trainer recipe bundle emitted from a registry-backed agentic LoRA training plan.
schemas.name: agentic_lora_backend_recipes

schemas.description: Side-effect-free model-registry lifecycle link plan for agentic LoRA training results.
schemas.name: agentic_lora_model_registry_link_plan

schemas.description: Persistent autonomy supervisor state coordinating agentic fine-tuning layer work packets.
schemas.name: supervisor_state

schemas.description: Dry-run receipt from the reference external trainer wrapper consuming a trainer consumer plan.
schemas.name: trainer_wrapper_dry_run
